views.name: DashboardView
views.purpose: Overview of recent interactions, pending follow-ups, top contacts, and network growth at a glance

views.name: EntrySheet
views.purpose: Quick capture of a person encounter — name, context, discussion topics, follow-up items

views.name: HistoryView
views.purpose: Chronological feed of all interactions, filterable by person, relationship type, or meeting type, with search

views.name: AnalyticsView
views.purpose: Network analytics — relationship distribution, interaction frequency trends, quality heatmap, top contacts leaderboard, follow-up completion rate

viewModelComputedProperties.name: todayInteractionCount
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Number of people interactions logged today

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weeklyInteractionCount
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Total interactions logged in the current calendar week

viewModelComputedProperties.name: uniquePeopleMet
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Count of distinct person names across all entries

viewModelComputedProperties.name: newPeopleThisWeek
viewModelComputedProperties.description: People whose name appears for the first time this week (first introduction detection)

viewModelComputedProperties.name: currentStreak
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Consecutive days with at least one interaction logged

viewModelComputedProperties.name: pendingFollowUps
viewModelComputedProperties.description: All entries where followUpNeeded is true, sorted by date descending

viewModelComputedProperties.name: topContacts
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Top 5 most frequently mentioned people, ranked by total interaction count

viewModelComputedProperties.name: relationshipDistribution
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Breakdown of all interactions by relationship type for pie chart

viewModelComputedProperties.name: meetingTypeDistribution
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Breakdown by meeting type for bar chart visualization

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weeklyTrend
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Percentage change in interaction count vs previous week (positive = more active)

viewModelComputedProperties.name: averageInteractionQuality
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Rolling 7-day average of interactionQuality slider values (1-10 scale)

viewModelComputedProperties.name: networkGrowthChartData
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Weekly cumulative network size for line chart — tracks how fast your network grows

viewModelComputedProperties.name: energyBalanceScore
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Ratio of inspiring+warm interactions to draining+tense ones over past 30 days — measures social energy ROI

viewModelComputedProperties.name: followUpCompletionRate
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Percentage of follow-up-needed entries that have a subsequent interaction with the same person within 14 days

dailyGoal.description: Target number of meaningful interactions to log per day — encourages intentional relationship building

domainLogic.streakDefinition: A day counts as active if at least one interaction is logged. Streak breaks if a full calendar day passes with zero entries.
domainLogic.trendAnalysis: Compare this week's total interaction count and unique people count against last week. Track 4-week rolling average of interaction quality. Monitor ratio of new introductions vs repeat contacts to gauge network expansion vs deepening.
insights: Neglected contacts: people you've met 3+ times but haven't logged in over 30 days — relationship at risk of fading
Follow-up overdue: entries with followUpNeeded=true older than 7 days without a subsequent interaction with that person
Energy audit: if draining+tense interactions exceed 40% of total in past 2 weeks, surface a 'protect your energy' insight
Network diversity score: Shannon entropy across relationship types — higher is more diverse, flag if one category exceeds 60%
Introduction velocity: new unique people per week trend — are you expanding your circle or staying insular?
Strongest connections: people with 5+ interactions AND average quality ≥ 7 — your inner circle
Weekly social summary: auto-generated sentence like 'You met 12 people this week, 3 new. Most interactions were with colleagues over coffee.'
